review_notes: Layer: light_overlays. Engine-blended CRT accent mask per environment_notes Light logic #3 ('CRT light should affect nearby faces only during bright frames ... dynamic flicker is fx_tv_light_mask, engine-blended, never baked into layers'). Tight halo (rx34/ry26) centered just below the screen aperture (native ~485,87), nudged toward table B / patron-east but staying well short of them. Sparse cyan_0/cyan_1 dither, max density 0.32, fully transparent elsewhere. v001 first pass (rx130/ry90, density 0.5) sprawled across a third of the room and over the notice board/pennant when composited over env_bar_bg_far+bg_mid — rebuilt tight and localized. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Verified by compositing over env_bar_bg_far_v001+env_bar_bg_mid_v001 at 3x — engine should only enable this during broadcast_glow-bright TV frames, not statically.
